name: Pesto Genovese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the olive oil in a food processor or blender.
2. Process quickly until pureed.
3. With the machine running, gradually add the oil until fully absorbed.
4. Toss with 1 pound of hot fresh pasta (vermicelli, linguini, etc.).
5. Serve immediately and garnish with cherry tomatoes.
